cn.description:
每日英语阅读，专为英语学习者打造，精听细读助你更好学英语。软件不仅会根据你的英文水平，每天推送地道的短文和原著，更有文件导入、单词本学习等功能，等你来体验。每天十分钟，养成阅读好习惯！

【资源丰富，每日更新】
编辑精选的英语文章，只需三分钟，轻松积累实用词汇，学习地道鲜活表达；
丰富的英文读物：经典名著、短篇小说、迪士尼·皮克斯电影双语阅读、少儿读物、名人演讲......原声朗读、双语字幕，带你感受原汁原味的阅读体验；
精听党：名著原声朗读，高亮双语字幕，结合干货知识点讲义和课后习题巩固，再也不用担心名著读不懂啦。

【每日外刊，深度专业】
选自主流的英美外刊，美国本土外教纯正发音朗读；
专业英语教师逐字逐句精讲，单词、语法、发音知识一网打尽；
每天2-3道练习题和配套答案详解，助你测评当天学习效果。

【功能强大、操作便捷】

生词学习：文章中长按即可查词并加入生词本，全平台同步，更有卡片播放等复习模式助你学习；
统计图表：每天的阅读记录都会通过图表生动展示，记录你一点一滴的坚持与努力；
阅读提醒：同学，今天是不是忘记阅读了？不要紧，软件每天都可以按时提醒你。

【文件阅读，即点即查】

cn.description:
《避难所：生存》是一款核辐射下的末日生存游戏。在游戏中你将扮演主人公泰德，需要在被核弹袭击的前60秒，合理储备你的物资，营救你的家人至避难所。在游戏中你需要做出一些困难的决定，例如合理分配食物和处理变异蟑螂的袭击等等。

在游戏中你可以坚持多少天？每个人是否都能活下来？当食物耗尽时，又该何去何从？要知道无论你捡到什么，无论你救了谁，都将对你的生存起到至关重要的作用。在游戏中每一个生存故事都是不同的，每天都会有出乎意料的事情发生，所以你需要定量配给食物和水，充分利用你的供给，甚至冒险进入荒地...话不多说，祝你好运！

《冰钓大师》是一款终极冰上钓鱼游戏，融合沙盒元素，让玩家体检冬季垂钓的乐趣。稀有的垂钓目标、栩栩如生的画面、逼真的物理机制、鱼类行为系统、广泛的渔具选择、不同游戏模式的单人和多人游戏、全世界各个不同地点、不断变化的季节、时间和天气条件，共同打造成这一款终极冰钓模拟游戏。鱼类挣扎、钓鱼地点、世界各地的物种等，这些都是其他冰钓游戏没有的功能，也是它们让这款游戏成为独一无二的钓鱼游戏。

游戏功能：
-单人模式
-32 种鱼
-21 个开放世界地图
-18 种竞争模式
-18 场锦标赛
-鱼类挣扎
-大量的数值统计
-角色自定义
-抖杆，通过抖杆来引诱鱼吞饵
-变化的天气和时间
-季节变化（秋季、冬季、春季）
-鱼类行为引擎。控制每个鱼类的人工智能和集群智能系统
-渔具，学习并掌握使用数十种鱼钩、鱼竿、钻头、鱼饵和鱼饵

道具描述：
在这款游戏里，玩家可以在美丽的开放世界地图中随意漫游，在不同的环境中探索河流、池塘和湖泊。敢于深入人迹罕至的野外，找到最大的渔获。
通过学习每个地点的深度地图和冰层底部拓扑结构来找到最好的垂钓点，这是一件很有趣的事情，但需要耐心和专注。钓鱼者最大的期待莫过于，在每一片湖泊找到最佳钓鱼点或者掉到最大的鱼。当把钓鱼线投入水中，等到鱼上钩时，真正激动人心的时刻就开始了！相比掌握位置，在正确的环境里使用正确的装备也同样重要。真实的鱼类行为系统，将近30种鱼的人工智能和集群智能系统让这款游戏成为高度模拟的钓鱼体验。玩家可以选择各种不同的鱼钩、鱼竿、钻头和鱼饵。对付不同鱼类的完美渔具组合取决于季节，天气和白天的环境尤为重要。在《冰钓大师》中，以正确的方式和深度控制水中的鱼竿和鱼钩本身就是一项技能。鱼竿和鱼钩的物理机制确保鱼类会对玩家的行为做出真实的反应： 一方面，独自垂钓没有时间限制，也没有竞争对手，玩家可以在家舒适地练习你的钓鱼技能，不失为不错的休闲方式；另一方面，漫长的锦标赛和自定义程度极高的单项比赛会考验玩家的技能和知识，但玩家会得到全新装备和无限荣誉作为奖励。

cn.description:
无与伦比的地铁模拟游戏《模拟地铁》现已登陆 iPhone 和 iPad。

• 入选 App Store 2016 年度最佳游戏
• 30 多个国家/地区的年度 Mac 游戏
• 英国电影电视艺术学院奖提名
• 荣获独立游戏节大奖
• IGN 年度移动游戏提名
• 入选 Gamespot 2016 年度最佳移动游戏

《模拟地铁》是一款为迅速发展城市而设计的地铁路线图游戏。连接各个站点之间的路线，开始运营列车。开放新站点时，透过重新规划使地铁路线保持高效运营。做决策，充分利用有限资源。你能使这座城市持续前进多久呢？

• 随机的城市发展规模，因此每个游戏均独一无二。
• 20座真实的城市，考验你的规划技能。
• 各种升级道具，有效调整铁路网路。
• 在普通模式中快速得分，在无限模式中放松，或在极限模式中面对终极挑战。
• 每天在每日挑战中与全球玩家一较高下。
• 提供夜间模式和色盲模式。
• 由 Disasterpeace （FEZ配乐师！）亲自操刀的自动配乐程序。

cn.description:
从寒冷的城堡冻原，乘坐疾驰的火车穿过沙漠，直至最后的边界。 全力以赴从各种生存条件艰辛密室中逃脱出来。探索各具风格的密室，密室建有多层地板、屋顶、通风口和地下隧道。开发你的创造力，使用各种日用品（肥皂和袜子）或一些有趣的随手可见的餐具等物品（叉子或钢板）制造武器和工具。

【游戏玩法】：
-顶级特色密室：
全力以赴从世界上生存环境最艰苦的密室中逃脱出来。你需要遵守密室的规定，做各种工作并遵循严格的日常安排；所有的一切都是在努力为你争取自由，早日逃出密室！

-建立你的装扮：
从大量的定制中选择你的角色，使其独一无二。当你策划逃脱时，时尚装扮很重要。

-制定你的逃脱计划：
在监狱里，你要开发你的创造力，使用有限的工具来制作各种道具。你可以将日常用品（如肥皂和袜子）组合起来，制造新的武器和工具，以帮助你实现目标。也可以从自助餐厅拿到叉子，在房间里铺一条隧道，并通过杂志和胶带制作海报以隐藏痕迹。你将很快了解到，胶带解决一切！

-逃脱队组合：
联合最多 3 个朋友组建终极逃脱团队，并设计出最疯狂的逃脱计划！聚拢于沙发上，为你的暗中冒险做准备。通过合作，你将创建更加精细和勇敢的计划。感觉没有竞争性？你可以进入对战模式，并显示出你有能力比你的朋友更快地逃脱任何密室。如果其他一切都失败了，在密室天井上解决你的敌对目标！

-准备战斗：
《逃脱者：困境突围》引入了全新的战斗系统，使每个密室的战斗更加激动人心以及具有互动性。你可以保持攻击姿态并围绕你的目标走动，以在作战中获得上风；也可以在合适的时间格挡已减少伤害。确保你先到健身房锻炼肌肉！

-逃脱新方法：
随着密室越来越艰苦，你将不得不策划更加周密的逃脱计划。应对任何密室逃脱都有很多选择。尝试制作药物混合物来伪造自己的死亡，让太平间做剩下的工作！

【游戏特色】：
-最多4名玩家合作逃脱
-玩家之间可以联机对战
-超过 300 个角色装扮定制
-多层密室，给你最真实的场景体验

**********************
【逃脱者：困境突围】

阿丽娜和弗莱德特这对好朋友落入了一座座生机勃勃的梦幻岛屿花园，花园里到处都是他们童年时用过的日常物品。他们携手踏上一段的情感之旅，审视友谊的意义：他们共同创造的回忆，必须舍弃的东西，还有永远不该遗忘的事物。

这对朋友迷失在一个可以塑造因果的神秘领域，发现时间能在各个方向流动。操控时间来解决谜题并到达每座小岛的顶峰。跟随两人一起揭开和探索他们共同度过的重要时光，点亮一个个星座，照亮苦乐参半的故事线索。

获奖剧情
• 充满活力，受故事启发的艺术风格。
• 关于冒险、友谊和成长的梦幻故事。
• 具有个人故事的华丽单人游戏体验。
• 精心设计的谜题需要掌控好时间才能解开。
• 探索二十多个神秘的超现实花园岛屿。
• 在手机上畅享主机游戏画质。

量身打造
• 随时随地离线游玩。
• 不中断。无广告。无应用程式内支付。
• 无障碍设计；简单控制，无文字、语音、时间压力或复杂UI。
• 由特色艺术家Tim Shiel打造的舒缓背景配乐。
• 支援横向宽屏游玩或高大纵向视图。
• 寻找和完成十七项成就。

cn.description:
SessionBand Jazz Fusion – Tom Cawley Special Synth & Vintage Keys Edition

Create studio-quality Jazz Fusion tracks to your own chords in minutes with this special artist edition of the award-winning SessionBand app - the world’s only chord-based loop app.

With over 20,000 precision-cut, chord-based loops across 15 diverse Jazz Fusion styles included, the app instantly converts the chords you select into great-sounding audio - wherever you are and whatever your ability. Perfect for songwriters and producers and the ultimate play-along for jazz rock and pop instrumentalists.

Highly acclaimed, multi award-winning pianist Tom Cawley is one of the most sought-after keyboard players in the world both as a jazz pianist (Dave Weckl, Jack DeJohnette, Charlie Watts, Jamie Cullum, Guy Barker...), and as a leading pop/rock keyboardist, recording and performing around the world with U2, Peter Gabriel, Andrea Bocelli, Amy Winehouse and many others.

For this special Jazz Fusion edition, Tom is joined by 2 of the world's top session musicians: Simon Lea – Drums (Rod Stewart, Dionne Warwick, James Blunt, James Morrison, Katie Melua...) and Geoff Gascoyne – Bass (Sting, Van Morrison, Georgie Fame...).

Tom's passion for jazz and for modern and vintage keys is reflected in the diverse range of styles in this edition. And Tom has employed many of the best keyboards from his vast personal collection: from the Oberheim OB-6, Prophet 12 and Moog Model D (as well as a modular set-up), to his vintage Fender Rhodes, Wurlitzer and Hohner Pianet - they all feature in the content of this app. And to do full justice to this genre, we have increased the number of chord variations to 15 for every root note in all 15 styles!

Alongside pro features like automated mixing, auto-transpose, one-touch live recording and a range of export functions, there are new tech features and upgrades like channel FX, instant PDF chord sheets and 'Track Builder' to make your track creation quicker and easier.

Create professional Jazz Fusion to your own choice of chords in minutes. Everything you need to create and share thousands of stunning royalty-free tracks.

Hear the results. Watch the video at sessionbandapp.com

The fastest way to create your own studio-quality music:

• Pick one of 15 Jazz Fusion styles
• Choose your chords
• Stretch or shorten loops
• Build up your track in minutes
• Instantly hear your track across different styles and tempos
• Auto-transpose your entire track
• Add FX
• Mix your track
• Adjust track tempo
• Record direct to audio
• Copy straight to other music apps
• Share with the world!

The ultimate mobile jam/practice tool for musicians:

• Practice with your own world-class band
• Loop markers let you focus on specific sections
• Mute instrument channels as you like
• Produce PDF chord sheets for the tracks you create...instantly
• 'Flip' your track across other styles and tempos
• Transpose your whole track instantly

You don't have to be a musician to create seriously good music and release it royalty-free!

• Simple, intuitive interface
• Audition the loop you are about to insert
• ‘Track Builder’ allows simple creation of a full track
• Intuitive mixing and record functions

Detailed Product Information:

• 15 diverse Jazz Fusion styles: Acoustic Rock; 70s Funk; Pop Rock; Neo Soul; Psychedelic Soul; 70s Soul; Jazz Rock; Disco Funk; Neo Classical; Latin Fusion; Indie Pop; Electro Pop; Electro Jazz; DnB; Groovy Six Four
• Tempos from 60bpm to 200bpm
• 15 chord variations for every root note: maj; maj7; maj7(#11); 11; 7; 7(b9); 7(#9,#5); 7(#11); min; m(#5); m7(9); m(maj7); m7(b5); dim; maj ‘stop’
• 20 alternative drum grooves/drum fills in every style in addition to the main drum groove
• The musical content in this app cannot be found in any of the other SessionBand apps
• All loops are offered royalty-free and can be used freely in your own works

cn.description:
Create professional quality jazz tracks to your own chords in minutes with this brand new edition of the award-winning SessionBand jazz app featuring exclusive, royalty-free, chord-based loops performed by 4 of the world's top jazz musicians: Jason Rebello (Piano); Jeremy Stacey (Drums); Patrick Clahar (Sax) and Geoff Gascoyne (Bass).

Volume 4 is the ultimate jazz play-along and the perfect tool for jazz songwriters. And we have added loads of extra features and tech improvements since Volumes 1, 2 and 3. Here's what you get:

1. 15 chord variations per root note! From straight major and minors right through to the most exotic jazz chords
2. 20 alternative drum grooves/fills in each style
3. Free access to over 150 downloadable jazz standards ready to play along to in any key!
4. Instant PDF chord sheets for the tracks you create
5. New tech enhancements like 'Track Builder' to make the workflow even faster.

With over 15,000 precision-cut, chord-based loops included in the download, the app instantly converts the chords you select into great sounding, royalty-free audio - wherever you are and whatever your ability.

For this long-awaited edition, we have gone back to mostly classic jazz with a couple of contemporary styles. Among the classics, expect to hear medium, post-bop Wayne Shorter swing styles in four and three, plus Wes Montgomery and Ahmad Jamal-inspired up-tempo swing styles. There's a contemporary Brad Mehldau-type piano and string style in 5/4 and a wonderful carnival-like worldbeat Cuban number with many rich, melodic tenor sax loops to choose from.

Create professional jazz tracks to your own choice of chords in minutes. Everything you need to create, share and publish thousands of stunning royalty-free jazz tracks.

Hear the results. Watch the video at www.sessionbandapp.com

The fastest way to create your own studio-quality jazz:

• Pick one of 8 jazz styles
• Choose your chords
• Stretch or shorten loops
• Build up your track in minutes
• Instantly hear your track across different styles and tempos
• Auto-transpose your entire track
• Add FX
• Mix
• Change tempo
• Record direct to audio
• Copy straight to other music apps
• Share with the world!

The ultimate mobile jam/practice tool for musicians:

• Practice with your own world-class quartet
• Loop markers let you focus on specific sections
• Mute instrument channels as you like
• Produce PDF chord sheets for the tracks you create...instantly
• 'Flip' your track across other styles and tempos
• Transpose your whole track instantly
• Download backing tracks for over 150 jazz standards for free (with chord sheets) ready to play. Transpose them with just one touch!

Get some of the world's best jazz musicians playing on your tracks:

• Jason Rebello (Piano): Sting; Jeff Beck; Wayne Shorter; Peter Gabriel...
• Jeremy Stacey (Drums): Noel Gallagher's High Flying Birds; King Crimson; Amy Winehouse; Take That; Eric Clapton...

hk.description:
透過連接方塊進行攻擊、防禦和治療，在無盡的地下城中生存。

Dungeon Tracer是一款結合了拼圖、roguelike和RPG元素的回合制地下城探索遊戲。連接相同類型的方塊，用劍攻擊，用盾防禦，用藥水恢復。每回合的選擇決定了戰鬥和生存的結果。

操作簡單，但策略深刻。透過更長的方塊連接觸發強大的效果，閱讀敵人的模式和戰場狀態，做出最佳選擇。每次的戰鬥流程和選擇都創造出新的遊戲體驗。

■ 推薦給
喜歡拼圖RPG和roguelike的玩家
喜歡回合制策略戰鬥的玩家
尋找可以離線玩的地下城遊戲的玩家
希望在重複遊戲中創造新建構和攻略的玩家

■ 核心遊戲玩法
連接相同類型的方塊進行攻擊、防禦和治療
每回合選擇至關重要的策略拼圖戰鬥
連接越長，連擊效果越強
死亡後從頭開始的roguelike挑戰
在不斷變化的情況下完成生存策略

■ 深度戰略戰鬥
方塊連接拼圖的直觀樂趣與roguelike RPG的戰鬥策略相結合。根據方塊佈局、敵人組合、技能選擇和物品組合，遊戲風格會有很大變化。

■ 10個職業和10個種族
每個職業都有獨特的技能和特性，與種族特性組合後可以形成完全不同的建構。嘗試各種組合，創造屬於自己的攻略。

■ 多樣化的技能和建構
結合40多種主動技能和成長元素，完成自己的戰鬥風格。選擇的技能和物品將導致每次不同的發展。

■ 特殊怪物和方塊減益
出現43種特殊怪物，包括巫妖、復仇者、神風特攻隊和刺客。再加上冰凍、火焰、毒素、破壞、鎖定等方塊減益，戰鬥的節奏不斷變化。僅僅連接很多方塊並不能保證勝利。

■ 公平的roguelike挑戰
採用基於種子的決定性隨機系統，確保同一輪、同一回合的結果相同。享受選擇和判斷比運氣更重要的公平挑戰。

■ 重複越多，成長越有趣
每次升級時技能選擇會有所不同
以升級和物品為中心的建構設計
每次運行都重新展開的地下城
一次失誤帶來的緊張挑戰結構

■ 全球排行榜
與全球玩家競爭分數。挑戰不同難度的全球排名，留下你的最佳記錄。

■ 4個難度級別
簡單、普通、困難、非常困難
提供適合初學者和老手的難度。

■ 高級離線RPG
無廣告
無應用內購買
支持離線遊戲

一次購買即可完全享受所有內容。

■ 多語言支持和雲存檔
支持22種語言，即使更換設備也能安全繼續進度。

無盡的地下城、越來越強大的怪物、每回合變化的選擇。
你能生存多久？
現在就來Dungeon Tracer體驗拼圖roguelike RPG的深度策略吧。

hk.description:
An open world adventure game filled with silly characters and terrible secrets.

Afterplace is an adventurous indie game for mobile devices. It's a huge open world, full of hidden secrets, treasures, and creatures. You'll run around the woods, fight monsters, and talk to ostensibly shady characters! All from your pocket! Be warned though - you never know what the forest might be hiding, and not all trails are paved. Labyrinths and dungeons are tucked away in the most concealed nooks. There are no waypoints in Afterplace. You'll have to forge your own path.

Afterplace has been designed from the ground up to be a fast, fluid, beautiful experience for mobile. There are no virtual buttons. You can move and attack by touching anywhere. You can tap objects directly to interact or attack, use two thumbs like a traditional controller, or control the game with a physical gamepad. The game will adapt dynamically to your play style. Pick up and set down the game at your own pace, it will always save your progress. Afterplace is made to feel like a full-fledged indie adventure game that fits in your pocket.


About the Author:
Afterplace is made by one person, Evan Kice. A former software engineer from Austin TX, Evan quit his job (to the dismay of his friends and family) and has been working full time on Afterplace since early 2019. The initial game released in December of 2022, but Evan plans on continuing to support and polish the game when he can!

hk.description:
靠窗還是靠走道？吧台還是桌子？獨自坐在角落，還是成為聚會的風雲人物？在《這位子形不形？》的世界，你需要依照大家的喜好安排位子。這款邏輯益智遊戲氛圍輕鬆、毫無壓力，誰待在哪裡，全由你來決定。

電影院、擁擠公車、婚宴、窄小計程車，每個場景都會引入具有特定偏好的新角色。聚會上有些客人鼻子很靈，不願意坐在噴了太多古龍水的陌生人旁邊。公車上有些乘客想小睡片刻，不希望旁邊有人大聲播放音樂。仔細觀察現場的所有角色，設法安排最合適的位子！

一心想進入影劇圈發展的納特，在大銀幕上看到跟自己一模一樣的演員之後，生活發生了翻天覆地的變化。納特就此踏上全球之旅，就是為了認識那個主角，還有設法在理想中找到容身之處。跟隨納特的腳步走過一座座城市，感受其心路歷程，並體驗不同的關卡、角色和魅力。

- 為各有偏好的角色安排合適位子。
- 探索角色各不相同的特點，有的似曾相識，有的莫名其妙，有的則介於兩者之間。
- 沒有計時，也沒有排行榜，只要輕鬆享受解謎的成就感。
- 只要推進遊戲，就能陸續解鎖有趣的新場景，例如公車、宴會等！

mo.description:
Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent.

After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD.

The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods.

That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

FEATURES
• Build your settlement on the newly discovered continent of Northgard
• Assign your vikings to various jobs (Farmer, Warrior, Sailor, Loremaster...)
• Manage your resources carefully and survive harsh winters and vicious foes
• Expand and discover new territory with unique strategic opportunities
• Achieve different victory conditions (Conquest, Fame, Lore, Trading...)

STORY MODE: RIG’S SAGA
The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen.
This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER
• Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players
• Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN
In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard.

More clans are joining the fight for Northgard!
• Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics
• Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices
• Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might
You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle.

• Clan of the Horse: Devote yourself to the art of blacksmithing and craft powerful Relics
• Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers
• Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes
You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle.

• Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters
• Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan
• Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources
Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle.


Carefully redesigned for mobile
• Revamped interface
• Game Center achievements
• iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices

If you experience any issue with Northgard, please contact our customer support at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

mo.description:
透過連接方塊進行攻擊、防禦和治療，在無盡的地下城中生存。

Dungeon Tracer是一款結合了拼圖、roguelike和RPG元素的回合制地下城探索遊戲。連接相同類型的方塊，用劍攻擊，用盾防禦，用藥水恢復。每回合的選擇決定了戰鬥和生存的結果。

操作簡單，但策略深刻。透過更長的方塊連接觸發強大的效果，閱讀敵人的模式和戰場狀態，做出最佳選擇。每次的戰鬥流程和選擇都創造出新的遊戲體驗。

■ 推薦給
喜歡拼圖RPG和roguelike的玩家
喜歡回合制策略戰鬥的玩家
尋找可以離線玩的地下城遊戲的玩家
希望在重複遊戲中創造新建構和攻略的玩家

■ 核心遊戲玩法
連接相同類型的方塊進行攻擊、防禦和治療
每回合選擇至關重要的策略拼圖戰鬥
連接越長，連擊效果越強
死亡後從頭開始的roguelike挑戰
在不斷變化的情況下完成生存策略

■ 深度戰略戰鬥
方塊連接拼圖的直觀樂趣與roguelike RPG的戰鬥策略相結合。根據方塊佈局、敵人組合、技能選擇和物品組合，遊戲風格會有很大變化。

■ 10個職業和10個種族
每個職業都有獨特的技能和特性，與種族特性組合後可以形成完全不同的建構。嘗試各種組合，創造屬於自己的攻略。

■ 多樣化的技能和建構
結合40多種主動技能和成長元素，完成自己的戰鬥風格。選擇的技能和物品將導致每次不同的發展。

■ 特殊怪物和方塊減益
出現43種特殊怪物，包括巫妖、復仇者、神風特攻隊和刺客。再加上冰凍、火焰、毒素、破壞、鎖定等方塊減益，戰鬥的節奏不斷變化。僅僅連接很多方塊並不能保證勝利。

■ 公平的roguelike挑戰
採用基於種子的決定性隨機系統，確保同一輪、同一回合的結果相同。享受選擇和判斷比運氣更重要的公平挑戰。

■ 重複越多，成長越有趣
每次升級時技能選擇會有所不同
以升級和物品為中心的建構設計
每次運行都重新展開的地下城
一次失誤帶來的緊張挑戰結構

■ 全球排行榜
與全球玩家競爭分數。挑戰不同難度的全球排名，留下你的最佳記錄。

■ 4個難度級別
簡單、普通、困難、非常困難
提供適合初學者和老手的難度。

■ 高級離線RPG
無廣告
無應用內購買
支持離線遊戲

一次購買即可完全享受所有內容。

■ 多語言支持和雲存檔
支持22種語言，即使更換設備也能安全繼續進度。

無盡的地下城、越來越強大的怪物、每回合變化的選擇。
你能生存多久？
現在就來Dungeon Tracer體驗拼圖roguelike RPG的深度策略吧。

mo.description:
An open world adventure game filled with silly characters and terrible secrets.

Afterplace is an adventurous indie game for mobile devices. It's a huge open world, full of hidden secrets, treasures, and creatures. You'll run around the woods, fight monsters, and talk to ostensibly shady characters! All from your pocket! Be warned though - you never know what the forest might be hiding, and not all trails are paved. Labyrinths and dungeons are tucked away in the most concealed nooks. There are no waypoints in Afterplace. You'll have to forge your own path.

Afterplace has been designed from the ground up to be a fast, fluid, beautiful experience for mobile. There are no virtual buttons. You can move and attack by touching anywhere. You can tap objects directly to interact or attack, use two thumbs like a traditional controller, or control the game with a physical gamepad. The game will adapt dynamically to your play style. Pick up and set down the game at your own pace, it will always save your progress. Afterplace is made to feel like a full-fledged indie adventure game that fits in your pocket.


About the Author:
Afterplace is made by one person, Evan Kice. A former software engineer from Austin TX, Evan quit his job (to the dismay of his friends and family) and has been working full time on Afterplace since early 2019. The initial game released in December of 2022, but Evan plans on continuing to support and polish the game when he can!

mo.description:
靠窗還是靠走道？吧台還是桌子？獨自坐在角落，還是成為聚會的風雲人物？在《這位子形不形？》的世界，你需要依照大家的喜好安排位子。這款邏輯益智遊戲氛圍輕鬆、毫無壓力，誰待在哪裡，全由你來決定。

電影院、擁擠公車、婚宴、窄小計程車，每個場景都會引入具有特定偏好的新角色。聚會上有些客人鼻子很靈，不願意坐在噴了太多古龍水的陌生人旁邊。公車上有些乘客想小睡片刻，不希望旁邊有人大聲播放音樂。仔細觀察現場的所有角色，設法安排最合適的位子！

一心想進入影劇圈發展的納特，在大銀幕上看到跟自己一模一樣的演員之後，生活發生了翻天覆地的變化。納特就此踏上全球之旅，就是為了認識那個主角，還有設法在理想中找到容身之處。跟隨納特的腳步走過一座座城市，感受其心路歷程，並體驗不同的關卡、角色和魅力。

- 為各有偏好的角色安排合適位子。
- 探索角色各不相同的特點，有的似曾相識，有的莫名其妙，有的則介於兩者之間。
- 沒有計時，也沒有排行榜，只要輕鬆享受解謎的成就感。
- 只要推進遊戲，就能陸續解鎖有趣的新場景，例如公車、宴會等！

tw.description:
Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent.

After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD.

The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods.

That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

FEATURES
• Build your settlement on the newly discovered continent of Northgard
• Assign your vikings to various jobs (Farmer, Warrior, Sailor, Loremaster...)
• Manage your resources carefully and survive harsh winters and vicious foes
• Expand and discover new territory with unique strategic opportunities
• Achieve different victory conditions (Conquest, Fame, Lore, Trading...)

STORY MODE: RIG’S SAGA
The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen.
This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER
• Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players
• Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN
In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard.

More clans are joining the fight for Northgard!
• Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics
• Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices
• Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might
You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle.

• Clan of the Horse: Devote yourself to the art of blacksmithing and craft powerful Relics
• Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers
• Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes
You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle.

• Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters
• Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan
• Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources
Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle.


Carefully redesigned for mobile
• Revamped interface
• Game Center achievements
• iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices

If you experience any issue with Northgard, please contact our customer support at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

tw.description:
透過連接方塊進行攻擊、防禦和治療，在無盡的地下城中生存。

Dungeon Tracer是一款結合了拼圖、roguelike和RPG元素的回合制地下城探索遊戲。連接相同類型的方塊，用劍攻擊，用盾防禦，用藥水恢復。每回合的選擇決定了戰鬥和生存的結果。

操作簡單，但策略深刻。透過更長的方塊連接觸發強大的效果，閱讀敵人的模式和戰場狀態，做出最佳選擇。每次的戰鬥流程和選擇都創造出新的遊戲體驗。

■ 推薦給
喜歡拼圖RPG和roguelike的玩家
喜歡回合制策略戰鬥的玩家
尋找可以離線玩的地下城遊戲的玩家
希望在重複遊戲中創造新建構和攻略的玩家

■ 核心遊戲玩法
連接相同類型的方塊進行攻擊、防禦和治療
每回合選擇至關重要的策略拼圖戰鬥
連接越長，連擊效果越強
死亡後從頭開始的roguelike挑戰
在不斷變化的情況下完成生存策略

■ 深度戰略戰鬥
方塊連接拼圖的直觀樂趣與roguelike RPG的戰鬥策略相結合。根據方塊佈局、敵人組合、技能選擇和物品組合，遊戲風格會有很大變化。

■ 10個職業和10個種族
每個職業都有獨特的技能和特性，與種族特性組合後可以形成完全不同的建構。嘗試各種組合，創造屬於自己的攻略。

■ 多樣化的技能和建構
結合40多種主動技能和成長元素，完成自己的戰鬥風格。選擇的技能和物品將導致每次不同的發展。

■ 特殊怪物和方塊減益
出現43種特殊怪物，包括巫妖、復仇者、神風特攻隊和刺客。再加上冰凍、火焰、毒素、破壞、鎖定等方塊減益，戰鬥的節奏不斷變化。僅僅連接很多方塊並不能保證勝利。

■ 公平的roguelike挑戰
採用基於種子的決定性隨機系統，確保同一輪、同一回合的結果相同。享受選擇和判斷比運氣更重要的公平挑戰。

■ 重複越多，成長越有趣
每次升級時技能選擇會有所不同
以升級和物品為中心的建構設計
每次運行都重新展開的地下城
一次失誤帶來的緊張挑戰結構

■ 全球排行榜
與全球玩家競爭分數。挑戰不同難度的全球排名，留下你的最佳記錄。

■ 4個難度級別
簡單、普通、困難、非常困難
提供適合初學者和老手的難度。

■ 高級離線RPG
無廣告
無應用內購買
支持離線遊戲

一次購買即可完全享受所有內容。

■ 多語言支持和雲存檔
支持22種語言，即使更換設備也能安全繼續進度。

無盡的地下城、越來越強大的怪物、每回合變化的選擇。
你能生存多久？
現在就來Dungeon Tracer體驗拼圖roguelike RPG的深度策略吧。

tw.description:
An open world adventure game filled with silly characters and terrible secrets.

Afterplace is an adventurous indie game for mobile devices. It's a huge open world, full of hidden secrets, treasures, and creatures. You'll run around the woods, fight monsters, and talk to ostensibly shady characters! All from your pocket! Be warned though - you never know what the forest might be hiding, and not all trails are paved. Labyrinths and dungeons are tucked away in the most concealed nooks. There are no waypoints in Afterplace. You'll have to forge your own path.

Afterplace has been designed from the ground up to be a fast, fluid, beautiful experience for mobile. There are no virtual buttons. You can move and attack by touching anywhere. You can tap objects directly to interact or attack, use two thumbs like a traditional controller, or control the game with a physical gamepad. The game will adapt dynamically to your play style. Pick up and set down the game at your own pace, it will always save your progress. Afterplace is made to feel like a full-fledged indie adventure game that fits in your pocket.


About the Author:
Afterplace is made by one person, Evan Kice. A former software engineer from Austin TX, Evan quit his job (to the dismay of his friends and family) and has been working full time on Afterplace since early 2019. The initial game released in December of 2022, but Evan plans on continuing to support and polish the game when he can!

tw.description:
靠窗還是靠走道？吧台還是桌子？獨自坐在角落，還是成為聚會的風雲人物？在《這位子形不形？》的世界，你需要依照大家的喜好安排位子。這款邏輯益智遊戲氛圍輕鬆、毫無壓力，誰待在哪裡，全由你來決定。

電影院、擁擠公車、婚宴、窄小計程車，每個場景都會引入具有特定偏好的新角色。聚會上有些客人鼻子很靈，不願意坐在噴了太多古龍水的陌生人旁邊。公車上有些乘客想小睡片刻，不希望旁邊有人大聲播放音樂。仔細觀察現場的所有角色，設法安排最合適的位子！

一心想進入影劇圈發展的納特，在大銀幕上看到跟自己一模一樣的演員之後，生活發生了翻天覆地的變化。納特就此踏上全球之旅，就是為了認識那個主角，還有設法在理想中找到容身之處。跟隨納特的腳步走過一座座城市，感受其心路歷程，並體驗不同的關卡、角色和魅力。

- 為各有偏好的角色安排合適位子。
- 探索角色各不相同的特點，有的似曾相識，有的莫名其妙，有的則介於兩者之間。
- 沒有計時，也沒有排行榜，只要輕鬆享受解謎的成就感。
- 只要推進遊戲，就能陸續解鎖有趣的新場景，例如公車、宴會等！

us.description:
Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent.

After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD.

The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods.

That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

FEATURES
• Build your settlement on the newly discovered continent of Northgard
• Assign your vikings to various jobs (Farmer, Warrior, Sailor, Loremaster...)
• Manage your resources carefully and survive harsh winters and vicious foes
• Expand and discover new territory with unique strategic opportunities
• Achieve different victory conditions (Conquest, Fame, Lore, Trading...)

STORY MODE: RIG’S SAGA
The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen.
This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER
• Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players
• Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN
In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard.

More clans are joining the fight for Northgard!
• Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics
• Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices
• Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might
You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle.

• Clan of the Horse: Devote yourself to the art of blacksmithing and craft powerful Relics
• Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers
• Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes
You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle.

• Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters
• Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan
• Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources
Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle.


Carefully redesigned for mobile
• Revamped interface
• Game Center achievements
• iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices

If you experience any issue with Northgard, please contact our customer support at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

us.description:
Survive in endless dungeons by connecting blocks to attack, defend, and heal. Dungeon Tracer is a roguelike puzzle RPG that combines strategic turn-based combat with dungeon exploration. Connect identical blocks to unleash powerful sword attacks, shield defenses, and life-saving potions. Your decisions each turn shape the outcome of battles and your survival.

■ Recommended for
- Players who enjoy puzzle RPGs and roguelikes
- Fans of turn-based strategy combat
- Those seeking offline dungeon adventures
- Gamers who love crafting new builds and strategies through replay

■ Core Gameplay
- Connect blocks to attack, defend, and heal
- Every turn's choice impacts your strategy
- Combo effects grow stronger with longer connections
- Embrace the roguelike challenge where death means starting anew
- Develop survival strategies in ever-changing scenarios

■ In-Depth Strategic Combat
Experience the blend of intuitive block connection puzzles and the tactical depth of roguelike RPGs. Your play style varies with block placements, enemy types, skill selections, and item combinations.

■ 10 Classes and 10 Races
Each class features unique skills and traits. Combine these with racial traits for diverse builds. Experiment to find your ideal strategy.

■ Diverse Skills and Builds
Mix over 40 active skills and growth elements to create your unique combat style. Each skill and item choice leads to different outcomes.

■ Special Monsters and Block Debuffs
Face 43 unique monsters, including liches, avengers, kamikazes, and assassins. Block debuffs like freeze, fire, poison, and lock can turn the tide of battle. Simply connecting blocks won't guarantee victory.

■ Fair Roguelike Challenge
A seed-based deterministic random system ensures consistent results in each run. Enjoy a challenge where strategy and judgment outweigh luck.

■ More Fun with Repeated Growth
Skill choices evolve with each level-up
Builds focus on upgrades and items
Dungeons reconfigure with each playthrough
A structure where a single mistake heightens the tension

■ Global Leaderboard
Compete with players worldwide. Test your skills against global rankings and showcase your best scores.

■ 4 Difficulty Levels
Choose from Easy, Normal, Hard, and Very Hard
Enjoyable challenges for both newcomers and veterans.

■ Premium Offline RPG
- No ads
- No in-app purchases
- Enjoy offline play

Once purchased, access all content fully.

■ Support for Multiple Languages and Cloud Save
Supports 22 languages, ensuring you can continue your adventure seamlessly across devices.

Endless dungeons await, filled with powerful monsters and strategic choices. How long can you survive? Experience the depth of puzzle roguelike RPGs in Dungeon Tracer today!

us.description:
An open world adventure game filled with silly characters and terrible secrets.

Afterplace is an adventurous indie game for mobile devices. It's a huge open world, full of hidden secrets, treasures, and creatures. You'll run around the woods, fight monsters, and talk to ostensibly shady characters! All from your pocket! Be warned though - you never know what the forest might be hiding, and not all trails are paved. Labyrinths and dungeons are tucked away in the most concealed nooks. There are no waypoints in Afterplace. You'll have to forge your own path.

Afterplace has been designed from the ground up to be a fast, fluid, beautiful experience for mobile. There are no virtual buttons. You can move and attack by touching anywhere. You can tap objects directly to interact or attack, use two thumbs like a traditional controller, or control the game with a physical gamepad. The game will adapt dynamically to your play style. Pick up and set down the game at your own pace, it will always save your progress. Afterplace is made to feel like a full-fledged indie adventure game that fits in your pocket.


About the Author:
Afterplace is made by one person, Evan Kice. A former software engineer from Austin TX, Evan quit his job (to the dismay of his friends and family) and has been working full time on Afterplace since early 2019. The initial game released in December of 2022, but Evan plans on continuing to support and polish the game when he can!

us.description:
Window seat or aisle? Booth or table? Lone wolf or life of the party? In Is This Seat Taken?, your mission is to organize groups of people according to their preferences. It’s a cozy, no-pressure logic puzzle game where you’re in charge of who sits where.

Whether it’s the cinema, a crowded bus, a wedding reception, or a cramped taxi cab, every setting introduces new characters with specific tastes. A party guest with a sensitive nose won’t be happy sitting next to a stranger who’s wearing too much cologne. A sleepy passenger won’t be happy trying to nap on the bus next to someone listening to loud music. It’s all about reading the room to find the perfect placement!

Nat is an aspiring actor whose world gets turned upside down when they see a shape just like them on the big screen. This discovery sends Nat on a global journey to meet their hero and figure out how to fit in. Experience Nat's heartfelt story as you travel from city to city, each with its own levels, characters, and charm.

- Play seating matchmaker to please picky characters.
- Discover each character’s unique traits—relatable, outlandish, and everything in between.
- Piece together satisfying puzzles with no timers or leaderboards.
- Unlock fun new scenarios as you progress—from bus rides to banquets!

Create studio-quality Jazz Fusion tracks to your own chords in minutes with this special artist edition of the award-winning SessionBand app - the world’s only chord-based loop app.

With over 20,000 precision-cut, chord-based loops across 15 diverse Jazz Fusion styles included, the app instantly converts the chords you select into great-sounding audio - wherever you are and whatever your ability. Perfect for songwriters and producers and the ultimate play-along for jazz rock and pop instrumentalists.

Highly acclaimed, multi award-winning pianist Tom Cawley is one of the most sought-after keyboard players in the world both as a jazz pianist (Dave Weckl, Jack DeJohnette, Charlie Watts, Jamie Cullum, Guy Barker...), and as a leading pop/rock keyboardist, recording and performing around the world with U2, Peter Gabriel, Andrea Bocelli, Amy Winehouse and many others.

For this special Jazz Fusion edition, Tom is joined by 2 of the world's top session musicians: Simon Lea – Drums (Rod Stewart, Dionne Warwick, James Blunt, James Morrison, Katie Melua...) and Geoff Gascoyne – Bass (Sting, Van Morrison, Georgie Fame...).

Tom's passion for jazz and for modern and vintage keys is reflected in the diverse range of styles in this edition. And Tom has employed many of the best keyboards from his vast personal collection: from the Oberheim OB-6, Prophet 12 and Moog Model D (as well as a modular set-up), to his vintage Fender Rhodes, Wurlitzer and Hohner Pianet - they all feature in the content of this app. And to do full justice to this genre, we have increased the number of chord variations to 15 for every root note in all 15 styles!

Alongside pro features like automated mixing, auto-transpose, one-touch live recording and a range of export functions, there are new tech features and upgrades like channel FX, instant PDF chord sheets and 'Track Builder' to make your track creation quicker and easier.

tr.description:
Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent.

After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD.

The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods.

That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North.

FEATURES
• Build your settlement on the newly discovered continent of Northgard
• Assign your vikings to various jobs (Farmer, Warrior, Sailor, Loremaster...)
• Manage your resources carefully and survive harsh winters and vicious foes
• Expand and discover new territory with unique strategic opportunities
• Achieve different victory conditions (Conquest, Fame, Lore, Trading...)

STORY MODE: RIG’S SAGA
The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen.
This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard.
The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination.

MULTIPLAYER
• Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players
• Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes

CHOOSE YOUR CLAN
In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard.

More clans are joining the fight for Northgard!
• Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics
• Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices
• Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might
You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle.

• Clan of the Horse: Devote yourself to the art of blacksmithing and craft powerful Relics
• Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers
• Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes
You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle.

• Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters
• Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan
• Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources
Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle.


Carefully redesigned for mobile
• Revamped interface
• Game Center achievements
• iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices

If you experience any issue with Northgard, please contact our customer support at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

tr.description:
An open world adventure game filled with silly characters and terrible secrets.

Afterplace is an adventurous indie game for mobile devices. It's a huge open world, full of hidden secrets, treasures, and creatures. You'll run around the woods, fight monsters, and talk to ostensibly shady characters! All from your pocket! Be warned though - you never know what the forest might be hiding, and not all trails are paved. Labyrinths and dungeons are tucked away in the most concealed nooks. There are no waypoints in Afterplace. You'll have to forge your own path.

Afterplace has been designed from the ground up to be a fast, fluid, beautiful experience for mobile. There are no virtual buttons. You can move and attack by touching anywhere. You can tap objects directly to interact or attack, use two thumbs like a traditional controller, or control the game with a physical gamepad. The game will adapt dynamically to your play style. Pick up and set down the game at your own pace, it will always save your progress. Afterplace is made to feel like a full-fledged indie adventure game that fits in your pocket.


About the Author:
Afterplace is made by one person, Evan Kice. A former software engineer from Austin TX, Evan quit his job (to the dismay of his friends and family) and has been working full time on Afterplace since early 2019. The initial game released in December of 2022, but Evan plans on continuing to support and polish the game when he can!

tr.description:
Window seat or aisle? Booth or table? Lone wolf or life of the party? In Is This Seat Taken?, your mission is to organize groups of people according to their preferences. It’s a cozy, no-pressure logic puzzle game where you’re in charge of who sits where.

Whether it’s the cinema, a crowded bus, a wedding reception, or a cramped taxi cab, every setting introduces new characters with specific tastes. A party guest with a sensitive nose won’t be happy sitting next to a stranger who’s wearing too much cologne. A sleepy passenger won’t be happy trying to nap on the bus next to someone listening to loud music. It’s all about reading the room to find the perfect placement!

Nat is an aspiring actor whose world gets turned upside down when they see a shape just like them on the big screen. This discovery sends Nat on a global journey to meet their hero and figure out how to fit in. Experience Nat's heartfelt story as you travel from city to city, each with its own levels, characters, and charm.

- Play seating matchmaker to please picky characters.
- Discover each character’s unique traits—relatable, outlandish, and everything in between.
- Piece together satisfying puzzles with no timers or leaderboards.
- Unlock fun new scenarios as you progress—from bus rides to banquets!

Create studio-quality Jazz Fusion tracks to your own chords in minutes with this special artist edition of the award-winning SessionBand app - the world’s only chord-based loop app.

Highly acclaimed, multi award-winning pianist Tom Cawley is one of the most sought-after keyboard players in the world both as a jazz pianist (Dave Weckl, Jack DeJohnette, Charlie Watts, Jamie Cullum, Guy Barker...), and as a leading pop/rock keyboardist, recording and performing around the world with U2, Peter Gabriel, Andrea Bocelli, Amy Winehouse and many others.

For this special Jazz Fusion edition, Tom is joined by 2 of the world's top session musicians: Simon Lea – Drums (Rod Stewart, Dionne Warwick, James Blunt, James Morrison, Katie Melua...) and Geoff Gascoyne – Bass (Sting, Van Morrison, Georgie Fame...).

Tom's passion for jazz and for modern and vintage keys is reflected in the diverse range of styles in this edition. pt.description:
Wipr blocks ads, popups, trackers, cookie warnings, and other nasty things that make the web slow and ugly.

Websites in Safari will look clean, load fast, and stop invisibly tracking you. You’ll notice significant improvements to your battery life and data usage. Setup is a snap.

The Filtr add-on extends Wipr’s blocking to all apps on your device. It acts at the network level, but unlike a VPN, it can access none of your data, and can be used in conjunction with VPNs, iCloud Private Relay, and custom DNS.

Wipr’s blocklist is updated twice a week automatically, and has enhanced versions for the following languages: Bosnian, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Macedonian, Malay, Montenegrin, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Spanish, Thai, and Vietnamese.

Wipr is a universal app: install it on all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Vision Pro) with a single purchase. It’s fully accessible with VoiceOver, Voice Control, and more. Dark, Tinted, and Clear icon variants are included. Family Sharing is supported.

Because it’s developed by a single independent developer and 100% funded by its users, Wipr only answers to you: no one can pay to have their ads unblocked, and there are no “acceptable ads”.

This app was made with love and patience. I hope you’ll enjoy using it as much as I enjoyed designing and building it.

– Kaylee

pt.description:
Sobreviva em masmorras infinitas conectando blocos para atacar, defender e curar.

Dungeon Tracer é um jogo de exploração de masmorras em turnos que combina puzzle, roguelike e RPG. Conecte blocos do mesmo tipo para atacar com a espada, defender com o escudo e curar com poções. Cada escolha em cada turno determina a batalha e a sobrevivência.

Os controles são simples, mas a estratégia é profunda. Ative efeitos poderosos conectando blocos por mais tempo e faça as melhores escolhas lendo os padrões dos inimigos e o estado do campo de batalha. Cada batalha traz um fluxo e escolhas diferentes, criando uma nova experiência de jogo.

■ Recomendado para:
Jogadores que gostam de RPGs de puzzle e roguelike
Jogadores que apreciam batalhas estratégicas em turnos
Jogadores que buscam um jogo de masmorras offline
Jogadores que desejam a diversão de criar novas builds e estratégias em jogadas repetidas

■ Jogabilidade principal
Conecte blocos do mesmo tipo para atacar, defender e curar
Combate estratégico em puzzle onde cada escolha é importante a cada turno
Efeitos de combo que se tornam mais fortes quanto mais você conecta
Desafio roguelike onde você começa do zero ao morrer
Estratégias de sobrevivência que se completam em situações sempre diferentes

■ Batalhas estratégicas profundas
A diversão intuitiva dos puzzles de conexão de blocos se combina com a estratégia de combate de RPGs roguelike. Seu estilo de jogo muda drasticamente com a disposição dos blocos, combinações de inimigos, escolhas de habilidades e combinações de itens.

■ 10 classes e 10 raças
Cada classe possui habilidades e características únicas, e a combinação com as características da raça cria builds completamente diferentes. Experimente diversas combinações e crie suas próprias estratégias.

■ Diversas habilidades e builds
Com mais de 40 habilidades ativas e elementos de crescimento, você pode completar seu próprio estilo de combate. A escolha de habilidades e itens resulta em desenvolvimentos diferentes a cada vez.

■ Monstros especiais e debuffs de bloco
43 tipos de monstros especiais, como lich, vingador, kamikaze e assassino, aparecem. Além disso, debuffs de bloco como congelamento, fogo, veneno, destruição e bloqueio mudam constantemente o fluxo da batalha. Não basta apenas conectar muitos blocos para vencer.

■ Desafio roguelike justo
Um sistema aleatório determinístico baseado em sementes garante que em cada corrida e turno, os resultados sejam os mesmos. Aproveite um desafio justo onde escolhas e julgamentos são mais importantes que a sorte.

■ Crescimento que se torna mais divertido com a repetição
Escolhas de habilidades que mudam a cada nível
Design de builds focado em upgrades e itens
Masmoas que se desenvolvem de forma nova a cada corrida
Uma única falha cria uma estrutura desafiadora que aumenta a tensão

■ Classificação global
Compita com jogadores de todo o mundo por pontos. Desafie-se nas classificações globais por dificuldade e deixe seu melhor registro.

■ 4 níveis de dificuldade
Fácil, Normal, Difícil, Muito Difícil

pt.description:
Um jogo de aventura de mundo aberto repleto de personagens excêntricos e segredos terríveis.

Afterplace é um jogo indie de aventura para dispositivos móveis. Trata-se de um vasto mundo aberto, repleto de segredos ocultos, tesouros e criaturas. Você correrá pelas florestas, enfrentará monstros e conversará com personagens aparentemente suspeitos! Tudo isso na palma da sua mão! Mas, atenção: nunca se sabe o que a floresta pode estar escondendo, e nem todas as trilhas são pavimentadas. Labirintos e masmorras estão escondidos nos recantos mais recônditos. Não há marcadores de destino (waypoints) em Afterplace. Você terá que traçar o seu próprio caminho.

Afterplace foi projetado do zero para oferecer uma experiência rápida, fluida e visualmente bela em dispositivos móveis. Não há botões virtuais. Você pode se mover e atacar tocando em qualquer lugar da tela. Você pode tocar diretamente nos objetos para interagir ou atacar, usar os dois polegares como em um controle tradicional ou jogar utilizando um gamepad físico. O jogo se adapta dinamicamente ao seu estilo de jogo. Comece e pare de jogar no seu próprio ritmo; o jogo sempre salvará o seu progresso. Afterplace foi criado para proporcionar a sensação de um jogo de aventura indie completo, que cabe no seu bolso.


Sobre o Autor:
Afterplace foi criado por uma única pessoa: Evan Kice. Ex-engenheiro de software de Austin, Texas, Evan pediu demissão do seu emprego (para a consternação de amigos e familiares) e tem trabalhado em tempo integral no Afterplace desde o início de 2019. A versão inicial do jogo foi lançada em dezembro de 2022, mas Evan planeja continuar dando suporte e aprimorando o jogo sempre que possível!

pt.releaseNotes: Corrigimos o problema que impedia o jogo de salvar o progresso em algumas situações.
pt.description:
Lugar à janela ou no corredor? Cabine ou mesa? Bicho do mato ou alma da festa? Em Is This Seat Taken?, a tua missão é organizar grupos de formas de acordo com as suas preferências. É um jogo de quebra-cabeças lógico, acolhedor e sem pressão, onde és responsável por decidir quem se senta onde.

Seja no cinema, num autocarro lotado, numa festa de casamento ou num táxi apertado, cada ambiente apresenta novas personagens com gostos específicos. Um convidado de uma festa com um olfato sensível não ficará feliz sentado ao lado de um estranho que esteja a usar demasiado perfume. Um passageiro ensonado não ficará feliz a tentar dormir no autocarro ao lado de alguém que esteja a ouvir música alta. É tudo uma questão de ler a sala para encontrar o lugar perfeito!

Nat quer representar e o seu mundo é virado de pernas para o ar quando vê uma forma igual a si no grande ecrã. Esta descoberta leva Nat a embarcar numa viagem pelo mundo para conhecer o seu ídolo e descobrir como se integrar. Vive a comovente história de Nat enquanto viajas de cidade em cidade, cada uma com os seus próprios níveis, personagens e charme.

- Organiza lugares para agradar a personagens exigentes.
- Descobre as características únicas de cada personagem: simples, excêntricas, tudo o que possas imaginar.
- Resolve quebra-cabeças satisfatórios sem cronómetros ou tabelas de classificação.
- Desbloqueia novos cenários divertidos à medida que avanças: desde viagens de autocarro a banquetes!

Create studio-quality Jazz Fusion tracks to your own chords in minutes with this special artist edition of the award-winning SessionBand app - the world’s only chord-based loop app.

With over 20,000 precision-cut, chord-based loops across 15 diverse Jazz Fusion styles included, the app instantly converts the chords you select into great-sounding audio - wherever you are and whatever your ability. Perfect for songwriters and producers and the ultimate play-along for jazz rock and pop instrumentalists.

Highly acclaimed, multi award-winning pianist Tom Cawley is one of the most sought-after keyboard players in the world both as a jazz pianist (Dave Weckl, Jack DeJohnette, Charlie Watts, Jamie Cullum, Guy Barker...), and as a leading pop/rock keyboardist, recording and performing around the world with U2, Peter Gabriel, Andrea Bocelli, Amy Winehouse and many others.

For this special Jazz Fusion edition, Tom is joined by 2 of the world's top session musicians: Simon Lea – Drums (Rod Stewart, Dionne Warwick, James Blunt, James Morrison, Katie Melua...) and Geoff Gascoyne – Bass (Sting, Van Morrison, Georgie Fame...).

Tom's passion for jazz and for modern and vintage keys is reflected in the diverse range of styles in this edition. And Tom has employed many of the best keyboards from his vast personal collection: from the Oberheim OB-6, Prophet 12 and Moog Model D (as well as a modular set-up), to his vintage Fender Rhodes, Wurlitzer and Hohner Pianet - they all feature in the content of this app. And to do full justice to this genre, we have increased the number of chord variations to 15 for every root note in all 15 styles!

Alongside pro features like automated mixing, auto-transpose, one-touch live recording and a range of export functions, there are new tech features and upgrades like channel FX, instant PDF chord sheets and 'Track Builder' to make your track creation quicker and easier.

Sixteen diverse fishing locations, from ponds to the deep sea
Rich biodiversity, ranging from tiny isopods to massive oceanic whales, from extinct ancient species to rare deep-sea Chthonoids

Rich and detailed species descriptions let you build your own aquatic encyclopedia as you collect

Enjoy the fun of fishing anytime, anywhere, no matter where you are
If you have an Apple Watch, simply flip your wrist to reel in a catch
